name: qianmian-chat
description: 千面聊天：多人设自动对话聊天室（Web）

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @qianmian/web" "npm run dev -w @qianmian/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @qianmian/shared && npm run build -w @qianmian/web && npm run build -w @qianmian/server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @qianmian/shared && npm run lint -w @qianmian/web && npm run lint -w @qianmian/server
